full_name: Rolled steels for general structure
scope_summary: Specifies hot-rolled plates, sheets, strips, sections, flats and bars of general structural carbon steel (grades SS330, SS400, SS490, SS540) used in construction and general machinery.

full_name: Rolled steels for welded structure
scope_summary: Weldable structural steel plates, sheets, strips and sections (grades SM400, SM490, SM490Y, SM520, SM570) for bridges, ships and welded construction, classified by toughness sub-grades A/B/C.

full_name: Carbon steels for machine structural use
scope_summary: Hot-rolled and forged carbon steel bars and materials for machine structural use (grades S10C to S58C, plus free-cutting and boron grades).

full_name: Structural steels with specified hardenability bands (H steels)
scope_summary: Low-alloy structural steels supplied to guaranteed hardenability (Jominy) bands, designated with an 'H' suffix (e.g. SCM440H, SMn438H).

full_name: Low-alloyed steels for machine structural use
scope_summary: Alloy steel bars for machine structural use, covering Mn, Cr, Cr-Mo (SCM), Ni-Cr-Mo (SNCM) and boron steel grades used quenched and tempered or case hardened.

full_name: Stainless steel bars
scope_summary: Hot- and cold-finished stainless steel bars in austenitic, ferritic, martensitic and precipitation-hardening grades (SUS303, SUS304, SUS316, SUS420J2, etc.).

full_name: Hot-rolled stainless steel plate, sheet and strip
scope_summary: Hot-rolled stainless steel flat products across austenitic, ferritic and martensitic grades (SUS304, SUS316, SUS430, etc.).

full_name: Cold-rolled stainless steel plate, sheet and strip
scope_summary: Cold-rolled stainless steel flat products; companion standard to G4304 covering the same grade families with cold-rolled surface finishes and tempers.

full_name: Carbon steel tubes for general structural purposes (STK)
scope_summary: Welded and seamless carbon steel tubes for structural applications such as scaffolding, towers and frameworks (grades STK290, STK400, STK500, STK490).

full_name: Carbon steel pipes for pressure service (STPG)
scope_summary: Seamless and electric-resistance-welded carbon steel pipes for pressure piping at ordinary and moderate temperatures (grades STPG370, STPG410).

full_name: Aluminium and aluminium alloy sheets, plates and strips
scope_summary: Wrought aluminium and aluminium alloy flat-rolled products across 1000-7000 series (A1050, A5052, A5083, A6061, A7075, etc.) in various tempers.

full_name: Aluminium and aluminium alloy rods, bars and wires
scope_summary: Wrought aluminium and aluminium alloy rods, bars and wires for structural and machining use, covering the common wrought alloy series and tempers.

full_name: Copper and copper alloy sheets, plates and strips
scope_summary: Flat-rolled copper and copper alloys including tough pitch copper (C1100), oxygen-free copper (C1020), phosphorus-deoxidised copper (C1220), brasses and phosphor bronzes.

full_name: Grey iron castings
scope_summary: Grey (flake graphite) cast iron classified by tensile strength (FC100 to FC350) for machine bases, housings and general castings.

full_name: Metallic materials - Tensile testing - Method of test at room temperature
scope_summary: Specifies the method for tensile testing of metallic materials at room temperature and the mechanical properties determined; aligned with ISO 6892-1.

full_name: Method for Charpy pendulum impact test of metallic materials
scope_summary: Specifies the Charpy V-notch and U-notch pendulum impact test method for determining the absorbed energy (toughness) of metallic materials; aligned with ISO 148-1.

full_name: Nickel chromium molybdenum steels
scope_summary: Low-alloy nickel-chromium-molybdenum structural steel bars for machine use, covering through-hardening and case-hardening grades (SNCM220, SNCM420, SNCM439, SNCM630, etc.) for gears, shafts and highly stressed parts.

full_name: Carbon tool steels
scope_summary: High-carbon plain carbon tool steels (grades SK140 to SK60, formerly SK1-SK7) for cutting tools, files, chisels, punches, springs and hand tools.

full_name: High speed tool steels
scope_summary: Tungsten-type and molybdenum-type high speed tool steels (SKH2, SKH51, SKH55, SKH57, etc.) retaining hardness at elevated temperature, used for drills, taps, milling cutters and forming tools.

full_name: Alloy tool steels
scope_summary: Alloy tool steels grouped into cold-work die steels (SKD1, SKD11), hot-work die steels (SKD6, SKD61, SKT4) and shock/cutting grades (SKS series), used for dies, moulds, punches and shear blades.

full_name: High carbon chromium bearing steels
scope_summary: High-carbon chromium bearing steels (SUJ2, SUJ3, SUJ4, SUJ5) for rolling bearing rings, balls and rollers requiring high hardness, wear resistance and rolling-contact fatigue strength.

full_name: Spring steels
scope_summary: Hot-rolled spring steel bars in silicon-manganese, manganese-chromium and chromium-vanadium grades (SUP6, SUP9, SUP10, SUP11A, etc.) for leaf and coil springs and torsion bars.

full_name: Hot-rolled mild steel plates, sheet and strip
scope_summary: Hot-rolled low-carbon mild steel flat products for general forming and drawing (grades SPHC, SPHD, SPHE, SPHF) used in automotive, appliance and general fabrication.

full_name: Cold-reduced carbon steel sheet and strip
scope_summary: Cold-rolled low-carbon steel sheet and strip for forming (grades SPCC, SPCD, SPCE, SPCF, SPCG) with good surface finish, widely used for automotive body panels and appliances.

full_name: Copper and copper alloy rods and bars
scope_summary: Extruded and drawn copper and copper alloy rods and bars including tough pitch copper, brasses and free-cutting leaded brass (C2600, C3601, C3604, C3771, etc.) for machined parts and fasteners.

full_name: Copper and copper alloy seamless pipes and tubes
scope_summary: Seamless copper and copper alloy tubes (phosphorus-deoxidised copper C1220, brasses, cupro-nickels) for heat exchangers, plumbing, air-conditioning and general piping.

full_name: Spheroidal graphite iron castings
scope_summary: Spheroidal-graphite (ductile/nodular) cast iron classified by tensile strength and elongation (FCD350 to FCD800), covering ferritic to pearlitic grades for high-strength ductile castings.
